args.content:
Activity 5: Virtual Escape Room
  - Description: Teams participate in a virtual escape room challenge where they solve puzzles and riddles to "escape" within a set time.
  - Objective: To enhance problem-solving skills and teamwork in a fun, virtual environment.
  - Location: Online
  - Date: 2024-12-13
  - Time: 14:00 - 16:00

Activity 6: Volunteer Day
  - Description: Team members volunteer together at a local charity or community service project.
  - Objective: To foster a sense of community and teamwork while giving back to society.
  - Location: Local Charity
  - Date: 2024-12-20
  - Time: 09:00 - 15:00
